# stalwart_dns_records (Data Source)

Reads the DNS record recommendations for a domain. Stalwart exposes the expected records as the read-only `dnsZoneFile` field on the Domain object; this data source returns that zone data so it can be published to an external DNS provider.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "stalwart_dns_records" "example" {
  domain = "example.com"
}

# The zone_file contains the DNS records Stalwart expects to be published for
# the domain (DKIM, SPF, MX, DMARC, MTA-STS, etc.).
output "dns_zone_file" {
  value = data.stalwart_dns_records.example.zone_file
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Fully-qualified domain name to retrieve DNS records for, e.g. `example.com`.

### Read-Only

- `domain_id` (String) Opaque server-assigned identifier of the domain.
- `zone_file` (String) DNS zone data the server expects to be published for the domain.
